data.title: OBOOK’s OwlTing Reports Fivefold Q2 Surge in OwlPay Harbor Volumes, Topping US$600 Million Processed
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

OBOOK Holdings, Inc. Class A ( (OWLS) ) has shared an update.

In a July 23, 2026 update, OwlTing Group reported that payment volume on OwlPay Harbor, its digital currency-based cross-border enterprise payments platform, grew more than fivefold quarter over quarter in Q2 2026. The company said monthly volume has increased every month since early 2026 and that July’s first three weeks had already surpassed June’s full-month volume.

Across the broader OwlPay platform, spanning fiat and digital currency transactions, cumulative processed payment volume exceeded US$600 million as of June 30, 2026, with 67 enterprise clients onboarded by that date. The business is seeing particular momentum in Asia-focused trade corridors and in regions such as the Middle East and Africa where U.S. dollar access is constrained, suggesting OwlTing’s regulated infrastructure is strengthening its competitive position in cross-border B2B payments and reinforcing its growth trajectory.

Spark’s Take on OWLS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OWLS is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by weak financial performance: sharply deteriorating margins, widening losses, ongoing cash burn, and a stressed balance sheet with persistently negative equity. Technicals add mild pressure with the stock trading below its short- and medium-term moving averages. Valuation is also limited by ongoing losses (negative P/E) and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on OWLS stock,
click here.

More about OBOOK Holdings, Inc. Class A

OwlTing Group, the operating brand of OBOOK Holdings Inc., is a global fintech company focused on building regulated cross-border payment infrastructure, blending fiat and digital currency rails. Its OwlPay platform serves enterprises across the U.S., Asia, Europe and other regions, leveraging licenses in 42 U.S. states, a VASP registration in Poland and a Bank API license in Japan to move funds into harder-to-reach markets.

Founded in Taiwan, the company runs subsidiaries in markets including the United States, Japan, Poland, Singapore, Hong Kong, Thailand and Malaysia, targeting business clients that need faster, cheaper international payments. OwlTing has been recognized among top global digital currency enterprise players and was ranked No. 226 on the Financial Times–Statista High-Growth Companies Asia-Pacific 2026 list, reflecting a 42% compound annual growth rate.

Average Trading Volume: 28,994

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $481.4M

data.title: Chorus edges closer to full fibre as copper base shrinks in Q4
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Chorus Limited ( (NZ:CNU) ) has issued an announcement.

Chorus reported a slight decrease in total fixed-line connections to 1.191 million in the June 2026 quarter, as ongoing copper disconnections outweighed growth in fibre lines. Fibre connections rose by about 5,000 to 1.147 million, lifting overall fibre uptake in its footprint to 75.9%, while the address base was refined by removing roughly 53,000 non-serviceable or vacant lots.

Data consumption on Chorus’s fibre network continued to climb, with average monthly usage reaching a record 731GB in June, up 9% year on year and supported by strong demand for 500Mbps and above plans. The copper-to-fibre transition is now largely complete within New Zealand’s fibre footprint, leaving only about 44,000 copper services in fibre areas and around 43,000 copper lines in non-fibre regions, underscoring Chorus’s progress toward a modern, high-capacity broadband platform.

The most recent analyst rating on (NZ:CNU) stock is a Sell
with a N$7.45 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chorus Limited stock,
see the NZ:CNU Stock Forecast page.

More about Chorus Limited

Chorus Limited is New Zealand’s largest fixed-line telecommunications network operator, providing nationwide fibre and copper infrastructure for broadband and voice services. The company focuses on rolling out ultra-fast fibre networks, particularly in major urban centres such as Auckland, Wellington and Dunedin, and on managing the transition away from legacy copper connections.

Average Trading Volume: 302,499

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: N$4.17B

data.title: Eniro Group Launches SEK 40 Million Share Buy-Back Programme
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Eniro Group AB Class A ( (SE:ENRO) ) has provided an update.

Eniro Group AB has launched a traditional share buy-back programme on Nasdaq Stockholm, authorizing repurchases of up to SEK 40 million between late July 2026 and the end of March 2027, with total holdings capped at 10% of outstanding shares. The company currently holds 363,508 shares, or 2.44% of its own stock, and has appointed DNB Carnegie to execute the buy-backs within Nasdaq’s prevailing price range.

The programme is designed to increase financial flexibility and optimize Eniro’s capital structure, while also allowing repurchased shares to be used as consideration in potential acquisitions or to support incentive schemes. This move signals an effort to refine balance sheet efficiency and could enhance shareholder value by providing optionality for strategic transactions and employee-related programmes in the coming years.

More about Eniro Group AB Class A

Eniro Group AB is a Nordic digital marketing and customer service company focused on helping small and medium-sized enterprises build local presence, searchability and digital marketing effectiveness. It offers a platform that uses intelligence, automation and streamlined communication, and also operates Dynava, which provides customer service and answering services, as well as directory assistance, across Sweden, Denmark, Finland and Norway.

Average Trading Volume: 18,325

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: SEK360.4M

data.title: RH Appoints Chief Customer Experience & Values Officer
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

RH ( (RH) ) has provided an update.

On July 23, 2026, RH announced internal leadership changes, promoting longtime executive Sandy Pilon to the newly defined role of Chief Customer Experience & Values Officer. Pilon, who has spent 18 years at RH in senior roles including Chief People Officer and Senior Vice President of Delight and Customer Service Operations, will oversee the company’s Gallery, Hospitality, Interior Design, Trade, Contract, Delight, People and Optimization teams across all global customer touchpoints.

Chairman and CEO Gary Friedman underscored Pilon’s role in RH’s evolution into a leading luxury home brand and framed her promotion as central to building one of the world’s most admired brands. Pilon emphasized the company’s focus on delivering exceptional customer experiences that reflect RH’s values, inspire employees and deepen relationships with customers worldwide, signaling a strategic emphasis on brand experience and values-driven culture as competitive differentiators.

The most recent analyst rating on (RH) stock is a Hold
with a $155.00 price target.

Technical indicators are modestly supportive, and the latest earnings call was a positive catalyst with raised FY26 guidance, but valuation remains relatively rich versus the recent earnings and revenue compression.

RH is a global curator of design, taste and style in the luxury lifestyle market, offering high-end home furnishings and related experiences across the United States, Canada, the United Kingdom and Europe. The company sells its collections through retail galleries, printed sourcebooks and its online platform RH.com, complemented by integrated hospitality experiences in its galleries domestically and internationally.

data.title: Reliance Power Sets August 14 Virtual AGM, Releases 2025-26 Annual Report
data.description:

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Reliance Power Limited ( (IN:RPOWER) ) has shared an update.

Reliance Power Limited has released its Annual Report for the financial year 2025-26 and issued the notice for its 32nd Annual General Meeting. The meeting is scheduled for August 14, 2026 at 12:00 p.m. IST and will be conducted via video conferencing and other audio-visual means, reflecting the company’s continued use of digital platforms to engage shareholders.

The Annual Report and AGM notice are being distributed electronically to shareholders with registered email addresses, while others will receive a letter with web links and a QR code for access. Reliance Power is also providing e-voting facilities to enable members to vote on all resolutions remotely, with the AGM materials available on both the company’s website and that of its registrar and transfer agent, KFin Technologies.

More about Reliance Power Limited

Reliance Power Limited operates in India’s power sector, focusing on electricity generation and related infrastructure. The company develops, owns and operates power plants and serves a broad base of institutional and retail investors through its listings on BSE and the National Stock Exchange, where it trades under the symbol RPOWER.

Average Trading Volume: 3,932,009

data.title: Farmers & Merchants Bancorp Highlights Strong Mid‑Year Performance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Farmers & Merchants Bancorp ( (FMCB) ) has shared an update.

On July 23, 2026, Farmers & Merchants Bancorp released a mid‑year investor presentation outlining its financial position, operations and market footprint, highlighting assets of $5.8 billion, robust profitability metrics, and strong capital ratios as of June 30, 2026. The materials show a conservative loan‑to‑deposit ratio, no brokered CDs or other borrowings, and an investment portfolio with moderate duration, underscoring a solid liquidity profile.

The presentation details exceptionally low net charge‑offs and non‑performing loans across agricultural, CRE, construction, C&I, consumer and leasing portfolios, supported by a sizeable allowance for credit losses and disciplined underwriting. It also emphasizes long‑term shareholder returns through rising dividends and share repurchases, national safety and performance rankings, and planned branch expansion into Lafayette, Walnut Creek, Elk Grove, Livingston and Lockeford, reinforcing the bank’s growth strategy and competitive positioning in its core California markets.

Spark’s Take on FMCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FMCB is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (high profitability, extremely low leverage, and solid cash generation). Support comes from an upward technical trend (price above key moving averages with positive MACD) and favorable valuation (low P/E plus dividend). Corporate events are a modest positive, reinforcing governance and shareholder-return signaling.

To see Spark’s full report on FMCB stock,
click here.

More about Farmers & Merchants Bancorp

Farmers & Merchants Bancorp, headquartered in Lodi, Calif., is a community bank serving Central California and the San Francisco Bay Area through 33 locations and 378 employees. The bank offers a full suite of commercial and middle‑market products, with more than a century of expertise in agricultural lending, ranking as the 20th‑largest ag lender in the U.S. and operating in a region with a population of 6.6 million and GDP of $559 billion.

The company has built a diversified loan book spanning agriculture, commercial real estate, construction, C&I, consumer and leasing, and emphasizes relationship banking, conservative credit culture and superior client service. It has a long track record of steady earnings and tangible book value growth, strong capital and liquidity, and has delivered 91 consecutive years of dividends with 61 years of increases, earning repeated recognition as one of the safest and best‑performing banks in California and the U.S.

Average Trading Volume: 87

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $938M

data.title: Kingfish Company Publishes Delayed 2025 Integrated Annual Report After Financial Restructuring
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Kingfish Zeeland BV ( (DE:93G) ) has provided an update.

The Kingfish Company has released its 2025 Integrated Annual Report after a delay caused by financing discussions in the first half of 2026, which postponed parts of the year-end reporting and audit process. Those talks led to a financial restructuring completed in June 2026, bolstering the company’s balance sheet and liquidity and enabling completion of the audit and report.

The company had previously shared preliminary unaudited 2025 results alongside a first-quarter 2026 update and has now apologised for the delay while thanking shareholders and stakeholders for their patience. An Annual General Meeting is set for 26 August 2026, and the full 2025 report is available on the company’s website, providing investors with detailed, audited financial and operational information.

More about Kingfish Zeeland BV

The Kingfish Company operates in the aquaculture sector, focusing on land-based farming of high-value seafood products. Its market strategy centers on sustainable production, targeting premium seafood markets and customers seeking responsibly farmed fish.

data.title: Kingstone Companies Boosts Quarterly Dividend, Signals Confidence
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

Kingstone Companies ( (KINS) ) has provided an announcement.

On July 23, 2026, Kingstone Companies, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors approved a 20% increase in the regular quarterly cash dividend to $0.06 per share, up from $0.05, payable on August 26, 2026 to shareholders of record as of August 11, 2026. This move marks the first dividend increase since the company reinstated its quarterly dividend in July 2025 and underscores the board’s confidence in Kingstone’s earnings power and profitable growth outlook.

Management highlighted that the higher dividend, together with the share repurchase program authorized in May 2026 for up to 1,000,000 shares over two years, signals an enhanced commitment to returning capital to shareholders. The company emphasized its focus on disciplined capital allocation, balancing shareholder returns with continued investment in its homeowners insurance platform, which may strengthen Kingstone’s financial profile and appeal to income-focused investors in the regional insurance sector.

Spark’s Take on KINS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, KINS is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong technical momentum (price above major moving averages with positive MACD) and attractive valuation (low P/E plus dividend yield). Financial performance is improved versus prior loss years, but balance-sheet/TTM comparability concerns and historical volatility temper conviction. Earnings-call tone is supportive with reaffirmed 2026 guidance, though catastrophe exposure remains a key risk.

To see Spark’s full report on KINS stock,
click here.

More about Kingstone Companies

Kingstone Companies, Inc. is a regional property and casualty insurance holding company whose principal operating subsidiaries write business through retail and wholesale agents and brokers. The company focuses on tailored homeowners insurance solutions via its Select product suite, supported by a scalable operating platform that targets significant market opportunities and strategic expansion.

Kingstone was the 11th largest writer of homeowners insurance in New York in 2025 and also provides homeowners coverage in California on a non-admitted basis. Its market positioning reflects a concentration in regional personal lines, particularly homeowners policies, where it seeks to expand its footprint while maintaining disciplined capital allocation and operational efficiency.

data.title: ARGAN and WDP in €13bn merger to forge European logistics champion
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

ARGAN SA ( (FR:ARG) ) just unveiled an announcement.

ARGAN and Belgian logistics landlord WDP have agreed a friendly share‑for‑share merger that will create one of Europe’s largest logistics property platforms, with €13 billion in assets, €700 million in annualised rental income and around 13 million m² of space across eight countries. The deal values ARGAN at a 21% total premium and includes an €11 per‑share exceptional distribution, positioning the combined group as the top logistics property player in Western Europe.

The merger will form a €5 billion fully integrated logistics platform in France built on ARGAN’s strong local brand and network, while doubling ARGAN’s investment pace via a sizeable land bank and combined self‑financing capacity of over €700 million a year. Management projects immediate accretion for WDP shareholders, enhanced dividends and liquidity for ARGAN investors, and largely neutral leverage, with family and institutional reference shareholders backing the transaction ahead of expected completion in early 2027.

The most recent analyst rating on (FR:ARG) stock is a Buy
with a EUR80.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ARGAN SA stock,
see the FR:ARG Stock Forecast page.

More about ARGAN SA

ARGAN SA is a leading French logistics real estate investment company, operating as a SIIC and focused on high‑quality warehouse and distribution assets. Together with Belgian peer WDP, it targets a broader European logistics market, leveraging a strong local footprint in France and a growing presence across Western Europe to serve major logistics and industrial tenants.

Average Trading Volume: 13,412

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €1.65B

For an in-depth examination of ARG stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

data.title: SL Green Realty posts wider loss, raises 2026 guidance
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock powerful investing tools with TipRanks Premium to make smarter, more confident investment decisions
  • Subscribe to TipRanks Smart Investor Newsletter, and discover new investing opportunities with data-backed stock picks

An announcement from SL Green Realty ( (SLG) ) is now available.

SL Green Realty reported a larger net loss for the quarter and six months ended June 30, 2026, with diluted EPS of ($0.38) in the second quarter versus ($0.16) a year earlier, while funds from operations came in at $1.43 per share, below the prior-year period that was boosted by one-time mortgage income. Despite softer year-on-year FFO, same-store cash NOI in Manhattan rose and office occupancy climbed to 94.7%, supported by robust leasing activity with significant rent mark-to-market gains.

The company executed a series of capital recycling moves in May 2026, selling the residential and retail portions of 7 Dey Street and a 49% joint venture interest in 346 Madison Avenue, and entering a contract to sell 10 East 53rd Street, collectively generating substantial cash proceeds earmarked partly for debt repayment. SL Green also continued to deploy capital through its $1.3 billion opportunistic debt fund and repurchased $14.1 million of common stock, while raising its 2026 FFO and net income guidance, signaling management’s confidence in improved operating income, incremental fee revenue and higher contributions from One Vanderbilt Avenue.

The most recent analyst rating on (SLG) stock is a Sell
with a $38.00 price target.
To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SL Green Realty stock,
see the SLG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SLG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SLG is a Neutral.

SLG scores in the mid-range primarily due to weak profitability and elevated leverage despite improving revenue/margins and solid free cash flow. Technicals are moderately supportive with price above key moving averages and positive MACD, while valuation is mixed (high yield but negative P/E from losses). The latest earnings call was notably upbeat on leasing/occupancy momentum, but near-term cash flow pressure from leasing costs and the time needed to cover the dividend with FAD temper the outlook.

To see Spark’s full report on SLG stock,
click here.

More about SL Green Realty

SL Green Realty Corp., listed on the NYSE as SLG, is a real estate investment trust focused on owning, managing and leasing office properties in Manhattan, along with select retail and residential assets. The company also operates an opportunistic debt fund and engages in joint venture developments, positioning itself as a major player in New York City’s commercial office market.

Its portfolio strategy combines core office holdings, targeted property sales and structured debt investments to optimize cash flow and capital recycling. SL Green’s emphasis on Manhattan same-store performance, active leasing and partnerships with global developers underpins its role as a bellwether for the health of the city’s high-end office sector.

Average Trading Volume: 1,109,835

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.91B

Find detailed analytics on SLG stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
